violations.description: Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing beef.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Underneath the grill needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel dispenser was not working at the time of inspection.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employees sweatshirt hanging on a rack storing food and kitchen utensils.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloths placed on counters. Store wiping cloths in sanitizer buckets when not in immediate use. Hand towels hung from shelving poles. Recommend using single use towels.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Service station refrigerator running at 50 degrees F. Adjust/monitor/service as needed.

Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. Multiple food items being re-heated in Food hold units. Ensure food is brought to proper temperatures within 1 hour.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing. HACCP plan not provided for vacuum sealing of raw meats.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units, reach in prep table cooler, and cabinets have build-up of food debris and need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under equipment and shelving units in kitchen and in walk in units have debris build-up and need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Damaged floor tiles and water damaged sheet rock in kitchen needs repair.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
